UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF MARISSOL LUSTOSA NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH NOTICE OF SITE INSPECTION AND FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SHALL COMPLY WITH A NOTICE OF SITE INSPECTION TO BE SET ON A WEEKDAY, EXCLUDING HOLIDAYS, OF PLAINTIFF'S CHOICE NO LATER THAN JANUARY 10, 2013. SANCTIONS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,160 TO BE PAID TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With N9otice Of Site Inspection And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
J. Scott Weaver, Esq., of Wartelle, Weaver & Schreiber (415-693-9102) for Marissol Lustosa, Plaintiff and moving party.
Diego Amaro, (415-532-7562) Defendant and opposing party in Pro Per.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF MARISSOL LUSTOSA Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Notice Of Site Inspection And For Sanctions is GRANTED as follows: Defendant shall comply with a Notice of Site Inspection to be set on a weekday, excluding holidays, of Plaintiff's choice no later than January 10, 2013. Sanctions granted in the amount of $2,160 to be paid to Plaintiff's counsel within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Order is signed in open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
J. Scott Weaver, Esq., of Wartell, Weaver & Schreiber (415-693-9102) for Marissol Lustosa, Moving party and Plaintiff.
Diego Amaro (415-531-9329) Defendant and opposing party in Pro Per.

The Court adopts it's tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF MARISSOL LUSTOSA Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Plaintiff shall file and serve its amended complaint forthwith. Order is signed in open court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
